strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at current role (re:cinq)
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-adjacent, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work is older (robotics era)
Cloud experience appears AWS-only; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth highlighted beyond GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior fullstack engineer with well over the required 6 years of experience, strong TypeScript/Node/React foundations, and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq. Testing rigor and architecture exposure align well with the role. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js and current Kotlin/Java usage, but the overall profile maps closely to the role's primary stack and responsibilities.
